<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Laravel\Commands; use Laravel\Dusk\Console\DuskCommand; /** * @internal */ final class PestDuskCommand extends DuskCommand { /** * The console command name. * * @var string */ protected $signature = 'pest:dusk {--browse : Open a browser instead of using headless mode} {--without-tty : Disable output to TTY}'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Run the Dusk tests for the application with Pest'; /** * Get the PHP binary to execute. * * @return array<string> */ protected function binary(): array { if ('phpdbg' === PHP_SAPI) { return [PHP_BINARY, '-qrr', 'vendor/pestphp/pest/bin/pest']; } return [PHP_BINARY, 'vendor/pestphp/pest/bin/pest']; } /** * Determine if Collision's printer should be used. * * @return bool */ protected function shouldUseCollisionPrinter() { return false; } }
